LanguageData.VQE_BattleDrone.label: battle drone
LanguageData.VQE_BattleDrone.description: An automated battle drone. It continuously patrols an area, looking for intruders. Once an intruder is found, it will relentlessly attack with a small stubgun.\n\nDrones have a limited lifespan and will begin malfunctioning as they near end-of-life, but can use standby mode to slow component degradation. They require connection to a powered drone transmitter to function.
LanguageData.VQE_BattleDrone.tools.0.label: shell spike
